entry.title: Performance Issues with New Learning experience

Currently, we are seeing performance issues while testing New Learning Experience in Preview instance. 

Is it happening to us only or its happening for other customers also?

Anyone noticed  this?

Thanks so much,

Ambika

entry.title: Re: make field "production plant" mandatory in COHV
entry.content:
Hello TimK, Making an additional field as mandatory can be done through below two options,

Screen painter- SE80 screen number UI based changes (Can be done by developer guy)

Screen variant SHD0 - Functional people can do.

But I would recommend you to with standard until there is potential productivity impact. 

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: add a field from marc table in top-of-page and alv re...
entry.content: There are some calls of report RCS11001 in the SAPMC29 main program in forms such as FCODE_REAKTION.

thanks for your input!

I couldn't get SHD0 working for this field, as it only let's me change the header fields.

Is your suggested SE80 option a modification of SAP?

Thanks and best regards

Tim

Margit

entry.title: Re: App Generator not getting luanched
entry.content: Sometimes you have to install in Global NPM with sudo (requires your Passwort), but this hint works.

entry.title: SAP CAP and SAPUI5 Hierarchy for Tree Table, how to implement hierarchy-node-descendant-count?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to implement a SAPUI5 smart tree table with oData v2, using a CAP backend application. I added the following SAP annotations, as found in another guide: @Sap.hierarchy.node.for, @Sap.hierarchy.level.for, @Sap.hierarchy.parent.node.for, @Sap.hierarchy.drill.state.for, and the hierarchy is shown properly in the table.

The thing is, there will be a request for each expandable node which is not ideal for performance and it also makes the table lose it's state after a refresh/rebind. This wouldn't be great for me as I want to provide some crud operations on the items and I'd have to refresh the data after saving, which would reset the scroll and node expand status.

I'm wondering if I'd be able to implement the hierarchy-node-descendant-count annotation in CAP as mentioned in the documentation for https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api/sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataModel%23methods/bindTree : Services which include the hierarchy-node-descendant-count-for annotation and expose the data points sorted in a depth-first, pre-order manner, can use an optimized auto-expand feature by specifying the numberOfExpandedLevels in the binding parameters. This will pre-expand the hierarchy to the given number of levels, with only a single initial OData request. I also saw some hints about a 'Tree state restoration' in the source code for ODataTreeBinding if that annotation is implemented together with hierarchy-sibling-rank-for and hierarchy-preorder-rank-for.

entry.title: Billing schema creation process
entry.content:
Hello,

I've been trying to create billing schema but "Insert rate" step is showing error ( No objects correspond to the selection criteria Message no. E9035 )

Can anybody please provide me Billing Schema creation process with Screenshots, so that it is easily understandable 

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Aman Gupta

entry.title: cXML Support in Trading Partner Management of SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Dear all,

today I would like to ask you to vote for the following customer influence request:

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

While SAP is heavily working on enhancing the B2B / Trading Partner Management solution on SAP Integration Suite there is one important B2B format still missing and not yet on the roadmap: cXML.

cXML / Commerce XML is an xml-based message protocol to exchange business documents (i.e. purchase order, order confirmation, shipping notification, invoice, etc.) between procurement applications / trading partners. A lot of e-procurement platforms (Ariba, Coupa, Jaegger, etc.) are using this standard. Therefor it would be great to have this also as a part of the B2B solution on SAP Integration Suite.

In case that you do like this improvement request and have similar requirements / pain points, please vote for this improvement to increase the chance that SAP will take this into consideration for the roadmap.

Thanks and best regards!

Christopher

entry.title: Re: Badi ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST Method SET_DATA not updating table
entry.content: Aren't CI_EBANDB and CI_EBANMEM already included in MEREQ_ITEM_S_CUST_ALLOWED, did you already read KBA 2542694 - Field changed via BAdi ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST or user exits EXIT_SAPLMEREQ_* not saved

entry.title: Re: cXML Support in Trading Partner Management of SAP Int...
entry.content:
Hi @Ivan-Mirisola ,

thanks a lot for this hint. I was not aware of this. I've created a discussion, now:

cXML Support in Trading Partner Management of SAP ... - SAP Community

Thanks and best regards!

Christopher

entry.title: Re: putaway by HU typens without a storage location indic...
entry.content:
Hi Kai. I can not answer directly to your reply (stupid new community pages), have to try this. You do not have to use a putaway control indicator, that is something which is used if you want / need to control the putaway product dependent. Otherwise, as I wrote, there is no direct way to use the HU type in the search strategy (in the standard), the only option is by using a HU type check.

Where the HU type comes from is not really important, but of course you need to have it assigned before create the putaway warehouse task. 

Brgds

Juergen

P.S: please do not search for a "storage location". You don't do that in a warehouse, a storage location is a very different object in SAP, which I guess you know.

entry.title: Re: make field "production plant" mandatory in COHV
entry.content: Hello, please keep entering into next screen until you get required feilds in SHD0. Regards, Prasath

entry.title: Re: Hana Cloud Database Integration with SAP Cloud Integration via JDBC part -2
entry.content:
@amysh95 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Record>
<Records>
<Header>
<StatementName>
<dbTableName action="UPDATE_INSERT">
<table>HEAD</table>
<access>
<Ariba_PR>PR477777</Ariba_PR>
<S4_PR>2000036670</S4_PR>
</access>
<key1>
<Ariba_PR>PR477777</Ariba_PR>
</key1>
</dbTableName>
</StatementName>
</Header>
<Items>
<StatementName>
<dbTableName action="UPDATE_INSERT">
<table>ITEM</table>
<access>
<Ariba_PR>PR477777</Ariba_PR>
<Approver_Name/>
<Start_Time>2024-03-29T02:27:44Z</Start_Time>
<End_Time>2024-03-29T02:35:47Z</End_Time>

</access>
<key1>
<Ariba_PR>PR477777</Ariba_PR>
</key1>
</dbTableName>
</StatementName>
</Items>
</Records></Record>

I am trying for the UPSERT function in sap hana db. but I am getting the below error. Can you please let me know if there is any configuration changes required in HANA db.

com.sap.it.rt.adapter.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCException: Input XML contains missing action attribute. XML cannot be processed.

 

SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database

entry.content:
How to Delete Supplier Master in S/4HANA Cloud

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Delete Supplier Master in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Data Protection and Privacy (5LE)
https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2402/SolP/5LE?region=DE

This scope item explains step by step the Blocking and Archiving process from setting up the ILM customising right through blocking/archiving and deleting the BPs. 

There is also the Help Portal page explaining "Blocking, Unblocking and Deletion of Business Partner, Customer and Supplier Master Data"
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/f86dc2eb1f8b48c880a7607213104b27/08c099af0ea14743b7e5c47c18541588.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: SAP Cutover Plan
entry.content:
Dear Kiya,
in general your cutover plan should consider all activities for IT as well for the Business to ramp down current systemlandscape and to ramp up target systemlandscape.
Depending on your transition scenario all activities for setting up the target systemlandscape as well as datamigration need to be considered.
My recommendation is to sort activities in dedicated Cutover phases & schedule certain Cutover Milestones / decision gates.
Check out the corresponding SAP Activate Roadmap for your transition scenario to get more details.
https://go.support.sap.com/roadmapviewer/


Best regards

Martin

entry.title: Re: Batch Management/Batch Determination
entry.content:
Hello Raj,

Batch will be determined depends in sort sequence and batch search procedure in assigned at order type level. please check at what based it was determined (Expiry date or GR date etc..)

You can refer this blog post for more information.

Batch Determination of components in the Productio... - SAP Community

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: How to stop HTML Viewer from refreshing?
entry.content:
Unfortunately, this question has remained unanswered so far, which is regrettable. Does SAP not have a solution? My impression, however, is that it is fundamentally not possible to use dynamic web pages within SAP Personas. This is because the transaction displayed in the browser, which might have an embedded WebView, is reloaded upon executing a script. SAP Personas would need to somehow cache this view or keep it available elsewhere, which is probably not feasible in this architecture. However, I am open to being corrected and am very interested in a solution.

My use case is as follows: I had the idea to integrate additional components, for example, a React application, within SAP Personas. Or other dynamic pages as well. But if a reload occurs as soon as an SAP Personas script is invoked, this seems fundamentally impossible, which would be very unfortunate.

When I create the integration thus:

Configure ODAT integration

and successfully test with these selections:

Test

The Relative Path in the config tab remains unchanged:

config

Saving the resource simply defaults to the selection of all fields.

I hope I have missed something here and would appreciate some assistance.

entry.title: Re: Should I update materail master after MRP area customize

Excluded from MRP will be carrying ND MRP type and other will carry PD as regular.

 

 

 

 

Regards,

Prasath

Margit

entry.title: Re: How to install SAPHANA Studio in Windows

entry.title: When installing the 32 bit DI API installer, it is not registering DI API properly (SAP B1 v10 240)
entry.content: When installing the 32 bit DI API installer (SAP B1 v10 240), it is not registering DI API properly, therefore the reference is not available or visible in visual studio. Is anyone aware of a work-around for this issue?

entry.title: Re: Error message "No space left on device" during build of CAP application
entry.content:
Amazing! We had this issue for a long time, but this finally solved our hacky workaround. Even a support ticket was filed and it wasn't figured out.

What I did, is add these properties to the specific modules that failed inside mta.yaml file:

 properties:
      npm_config_cache: .npmcache
      npm_config_prefer_offline: true

entry.title: Can we delete the UDT/UDO log tables, if we untick logging for a UDO?
entry.content:
When we create a UDO, we have the option to create Log tables, when we untick this option, the log table stops logging, but the table is not deleted from the database. Can we delete the log table from the SAP B1 database?

We are using version 9.3 PL12 and also version 10 latest (240).

entry.title: Re: SAP DISCLOSURE MANAGEMENT IN LEARNING HUB
entry.content:
Hi @Mbenaddi
We currently do not provide learning material for this topic. 
On our SAP Disclosure Management site on SAP Help Portal you find a variety of helpful documentation.
Please join the SAP Disclosure Management | SAP Community where you can connect with experts and fellow users to discuss and learn about SAP Disclosure Management. Find resources, share insights, and get help from others.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Advanced Technologies in TBML Detection
entry.content:
The battle against Trade-Based Money Laundering (TBML) is ongoing, with criminals continuously devising new methods to exploit loopholes and disguise illicit funds within legitimate trade transactions. However, advancements in technology are offering significant advantages in detecting and deterring TBML activities. Here's an exploration of some of the latest advancements:

  1. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs): Untangling the Web of Deceit

Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are tailored to analyze complex networks, making them instrumental in TBML detection:

  • Identifying Shell Companies: GNNs analyze the network of companies to detect unusual connections that may indicate shell company activity.
  • Unveiling Money Laundering Networks: By analyzing financial transactions, GNNs help map out TBML networks and identify key players.
  • Predicting Risky Trade Routes: GNNs analyze historical data to predict high-risk trade routes, aiding authorities in focusing their resources effectively.
  1. Explainable AI (XAI) for TBML Detection: Trust and Transparency

Explainable AI (XAI) techniques provide transparency into AI models' decisions, ensuring trust and fairness:

  • Identifying Biases: XAI helps identify biases in AI models, ensuring fairness in flagging suspicious activities.
  • Improving Model Performance: By understanding why a transaction is flagged, analysts can refine AI models for better accuracy.
  • Building Trust: XAI fosters trust by offering clear explanations for AI model decisions, instilling confidence in stakeholders.
  1. Natural Language Processing (NLP) with a Focus on Deception Detection

NLP analyzes communication between parties involved in trade transactions to identify deception:

  • Sentiment Analysis: NLP detects suspicious communication patterns through sentiment analysis of trade communications.
  • Identifying Obfuscation Techniques: NLP identifies linguistic patterns indicative of attempts to obfuscate transaction details.
  • Deception Detection in Trade Narratives: Advanced NLP analyzes trade narratives for inconsistencies or emotionally charged language signaling TBML.

The Future of TBML Detection: A Collaborative Ecosystem

These technologies represent advancements in TBML detection, but success requires collaboration:

  • Data Sharing: Secure data sharing between financial institutions, law enforcement, and regulatory bodies is crucial.
  • Global Collaboration: International cooperation is vital to effectively combat TBML across borders.
  • Continuous Learning: Continuous research and training are necessary to stay ahead of evolving TBML tactics.

While these technologies offer promising avenues for TBML detection, they must be balanced with considerations of accuracy, privacy, and ethical use. By harnessing the power of advanced technologies and fostering collaboration, we can create a more secure financial ecosystem, making it increasingly challenging for criminals to exploit trade for illicit purposes.

entry.title: Warning - Upgrading individual databases from v9.3 PL12 to v10 (1000.240.14) via the Setup Wizard
entry.content:
We were upgrading individual databases from v9.3 PL12 to v10 (1000.240.14) via the Setup Wizard.

Upgrade Wizard Precheck: Database structure check for SAP Business One indexes. When you run the SAP Business One upgrade wizard, during the upgrade precheck process, some manual changes to system indexes are detected. We are confirming the warning and upgrading the database, but we would like to understand why this is happening, since we haven't changed any table indexes. Looking at the log, we can see that most of the index mismatch tables are SAP table.

entry.title: How to develop an API-Endpoint with CAP?
entry.content:
I created a simple OData v.4 API with Node.js CAP. Let's call it simpleapi-srv.

If I open the application route for this api in the browser I get the following error message: 401 - Unauthorized.

I therefore created another application simpleapi based on the standalone app router. If I open the application route of this app I can login with my BTP user (and sucessfully work with the API). I understand by calling the app with the standalone app router the app router handles (with the help of the xsuaa) service the SAML / OAuth flow and ensures (via re-direction) the login process.

My question:
How can I provide an API-URL to an external partner and how do I grant him corresponding authorization? So e.g. he can use the API endpoint via postman or within his custom application development (outside BTP).

Does it make sense to create a service key for simpleapi and use the OAuth credentials from the key? How do I manage authorization (scopes and roles). I assume the CDS role defintion do not have any effect for the user in the service key....?

entry.title: Service Layer Load Balancer not behaving as expected by industry standards.
entry.content:
Any load balancer is logically expected to have a single end point. In SAP Business One v10 SQL (1000240), when we create Nodes, they load balance and remain on the same server. But when we create a load balancer on another machine, we end up with two different end points which a developer needs to connect to. This is not how a load balancer works ideally, a developer should have a single end point regardless of how the load is balanced.

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

  • Install Service Layer for SAP B1 v10 in one server
  • Install Service Layer Component for SAP B1 v10 on another server
  • You will now have two different IP addresses and logins for the service layer
  • A load balancer should automatically balance the load, without developers worrying about when to connect to which machine

entry.title: Re: How to install SAPHANA Studio in Windows
entry.content:
As I said before, if you don't have an S-USER to be able to login on the SAP SOFTWARE CENTER, you can't download from SAP.

The alternative is to use the DEVELOPER edition (the former link I provided). It's also from SAP, but involves more manual steps to install and can have bugs.

entry.title: Re: H1 2023 release - ECT-190481 Enhancements to Recurrin...
entry.content:
Hello,


I have implemented a basic rule assigned to onSave on the Recurring Pay Component, and it's working. 

Best regards, 

Irini Stergiaki

entry.title: Has anyone tried posting Journals in batch?
entry.content:
I remember, when posting things in batch via BPA ETL tool, I managed to improve performance when posting things in batch. Not sure if anyone has worked out how to do this via DI-API?

We are trying to post millions of journals (14 million) in one SAP B1 database, so every second counts.

entry.title: Re: Missing Automated Defect Recording Pop Up for QM-Qual...
entry.content:
Hello becca656, Ideally if we have set defect recording in MIC's control indicator, Pop-up will be trigged if the results are outside the limit.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: Onboarding to SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition - Setup and Configuration
entry.content:
SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition 

Hi @Alejandro1  i m trying to create my first workspace using Build Work Zone advanced edition. I'm not able to access my admin console, getting "access denied" error message.

Being the only default user in this account, i do have assigned my user id to Workzone_Admin group user.  

Can you please help to fix this issue with my admin console. Appreciating your support/expert guidance

Thanks, Jey.

entry.title: Print custom page range from Crystal Report Viewer
entry.content:
We use Crystal Report Viewer 13 SP34 (32-Bit) in a .NET application.
When printing from preview the custom page range does not behave as expected:

 

Selected Page RangeResult
any single page value (e.g. 3)page currently shown in preview window
single page range (e.g. 3-3) page currently shown in preview window
comma-separated selection (e.g. 1,2)error message "something went wrong"
combined selection (e.g. 1-2,3)error message "something went wrong"
page range selection (e.g. 1-2)prints range as expected

Can anyone confirm this problem and is there a solution?

entry.title: Re: Field for Training Provider at Item Level
entry.content:
Good day @Bumin,

Few additional questions to your request:

- will it always be a 1:1 relationship between one given item and training provider?

- how many training providers are you looking at? a few, dozens or hundreds?

Standard documentation offers item details fields: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_LEARNING/5fae31b1299d4033b665edabea7b9087/138b81142601487797b33714e9fe253f.html?q=item%20fields

and curriculum details fields: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_LEARNING/68656c0852e14b3b97fa47815152dd2c/8239993cfbce46d6ab9068e0e1ff9b63.html?q=curriculum%20fields

KR, Frederic

entry.title: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content:
I am looking for a data source in SAP Business Bydesign that combines Customer Return ID and Inbound Delivery ID.
What data source do you use for the merge?

entry.title: How do you retrieve an PM equipment using a linked FI asset number? (ABAP)
entry.content:
More specifically...How do you retrieve an PM equipment using a linked FI asset number QUICKLY?

If I use ILOA/ITOB tables or V_EQUI view, the select statement takes upwards of two minutes.

Using the front-end (transaction code IE03) it takes less than a second to retrieve the equipment if specify the asset number.

Therefore, how can I retrieve an equipment number linked to an asset using a similar method to the front-end (IE03) to return the value quickly?

entry.title: Can Modify standard programs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition?
entry.content:
I have a request from a user to modify the Balance Sheet/Income Statement program, especially the tabs and columns.

Is it possible to modify the program in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition? because as far as I know, this SAP product cannot access SAPGUI? If you can't modify the standard program, what solution can you do?

Thank You.

entry.title: SAP ARIBA SLP | How to delete a questionnaire linked to a process?
entry.content:
Dear SLP Experts,

 When you delete a process it may happen that the associated questionnaire is not deleted and is visible in the Questionnaires section. This happens when the supplier provided a response and the questionnaire has been approved. How can I remove it? This information is no longer useful and in some cases misleading.

Thanks for support.

Kind regards,

federico

entry.title: Re: SAP Concur User Provisioning: Assigning Entitlements and Roles
entry.content:
Hello DoaneA, 

Thank you for explaining the user provisioning API. We have the Standard edition of SAP Concur. Is it possible to configure the role groups in this edition?

Additionally, if we were to upgrade to the Professional/Premium edition, how can we find the role groups associated with specific roles?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to express my genuine interest in acquiring a free certification opportunity in Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP. As a full-stack developer in India, I recently completed a learning journey focused on Building Side-by-Side extensions on SAP BTP. With 0.8 years of professional experience, I aim to further refine my skills through formal certification.

In addition to the mentioned learning journey, I've pursued various relevant educational endeavors, strengthening my foundation for excelling in this certification. These include Creating Applications and Extensions using SAP Build Code, Developing an SAP Fiori Elements App Based on a CAP OData V4 Service, joining webinars on S4Hana Public cloud and fiori that provided valuable insights.

As a first-generation learner, I deeply value continuous learning and professional growth. Acquiring this certification would not only validate my competencies but also foster personal and career advancement. I am committed to investing time and effort into expanding my skill set, knowing this certification will significantly contribute to my professional journey.

I am confident that the knowledge and insights gained from this certification will enable me to make meaningful contributions to my current and future projects.

Recognizing the significance of certifications in today's competitive landscape, I appreciate the opportunity to apply for this program. I assure you of my dedication and readiness to leverage this opportunity to its fullest potential.

Thank you for considering my application. I eagerly await further details regarding the process. Kindly inform me if any additional information are required.

SAP Community screenname - sunilpadhy

Looking forward to your positive response 

Thanks and regards,

Sunil Kumar Padhy 

 

SAP Cloud Application Programming Model

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile Deletion
entry.content:
Good day @Vinit_kumar,

 

Please read p368 and p384 in https://help.sap.com/doc/844cba6db4b0477e92867df6c24a2109/2311/en-US/SF_Admin_Help_en.pdf

"Pending Deletion: The system recognizes that you’ve deleted the object, but the assignment profile hasn’t been
propagated so users still have the assignment"

How to propagate an AP is described in this kba https://me.sap.com/notes/2286448/E

Hope that helps.

KR, Frederic

entry.title: Information of CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT report
entry.content:
I need inputs and information on report CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT

  • What is the purpose of the report CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT
  • Is there any SAP documentation which explains on the functionality/usage of report CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT
  • Need to understand the ways to restrict status change for a change document while using this report for a Normal Change vs Urgent change

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Information of CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT report
entry.content:
Please check below KBAs, wiki, community pages for the information on the use of report "CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT" and more.

2285580 - CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT does not change status [VIDEO]

3341905 - ChaRM: CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT fails to change status with NEXT_STATUS_CANCX_BASE

3355414 - Unexpected sequence of change documents when using CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT

3103522 - How to unconditionally withdraw a Charm document - Solution Manager

3235803- Is it possible to restrict the use of CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT? - Solution Manager

ChaRM has report CRM_SOCM_SERVICE_REPORT that allows the user to "unconditional withdraw" the document, but the user will be responsible for correcting the objects in the managed development systems--which can lead to inconsistencies if the user does this wrong. For more details about this please see 3103522 .

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/8b923a2175be4939816f0981b73856c7/48db8900a73b04e7e10000000a42189c.html

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/10e6d9cb3bc740e6a4c41588d9fc07a3/45c430ca26f74e949e8504f2ada3695b.html

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/change-request-management-scenario-usual-questions-and-known-errors-7-1/ba-p/12894554

entry.title: Re: Turning Strategy into Reality with Business Architecture
entry.content:
It was such an honor to present on Turning Strategy Into Reality and to highlight the critical role of business architecture as a critical enabler for strategy execution.  This underscores the increasing strategic relevance of enterprise architecture and enterprise architects now and into the future.

I look forward to continuing the conversation with this community!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to express my genuine interest in acquiring a free certification opportunity in Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP. As a full-stack developer in India, I recently completed a learning journey focused on Building Side-by-Side extensions on SAP BTP. With 0.8 years of professional experience, I aim to further refine my skills through formal certification.

In addition to the mentioned learning journey, I've pursued various relevant educational endeavors, strengthening my foundation for excelling in this certification. These include Creating Applications and Extensions using SAP Build Code, Developing an SAP Fiori Elements App Based on a CAP OData V4 Service, joining webinars on S4Hana Public cloud and fiori that provided valuable insights.

As a first-generation learner, I deeply value continuous learning and professional growth. Acquiring this certification would not only validate my competencies but also foster personal and career advancement. I am committed to investing time and effort into expanding my skill set, knowing this certification will significantly contribute to my professional journey.

I am confident that the knowledge and insights gained from this certification will enable me to make meaningful contributions to my current and future projects.

Recognizing the significance of certifications in today's competitive landscape, I appreciate the opportunity to apply for this program. I assure you of my dedication and readiness to leverage this opportunity to its fullest potential.

Thank you for considering my application. I eagerly await further details regarding the process. Kindly inform me if any additional information are required.

SAP Community screenname - ujaleswar

Looking forward to your positive response. 

Thanks and regards,

Ujaleswar Rao

entry.title: Re: Build Apps Import Project
entry.content:
Hi Vishal. We deprecated the old AppGyver site in January. If we receive enough user requests to retrieve the old projects, we may consider re-opening it, but keep in mind that this is a manual effort. I can contact you again if this is planned. Sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused.

-Esmeé

entry.title: 提升供应链管理效率，物料临期管理App助力企业智能决策
entry.content:
在支持公有云客户的过程中，我们经常听到启用批次管理的客户在问是否有对临近效期物料的提醒、是否有对临近效期物料的批量查询报表，在标准产品中要查询相关信息需要检索多张报表，比如库存报表、批次信息等。为满足这一需求，我们在S/4HANA公有云上通过开发者可扩展性（也被称为云ABAP开发）开发了一款物料临期管理App，旨在帮助企业智能化地管理物料效期，提高供应链管理效率。

1. 业务背景

在生产制造如药品、医疗器械、化妆品、食品生产领域，或零售领域，物料的效期管理是供应链环节中至关重要的一环，在SAP公有云解决方案中，企业通常会为需要管理效期的物料启用批次管理，使用批次基本视图中自带的字段再叠加批次分类特性来管理生产日期、有效期、效期剩余天数、生产厂商、生产批号等产品效期管理相关的属性。业务上，物料的过期或临近过期可能导致废弃、损失利润甚至影响客户的满意度。因此，合理的效期管理对企业的供应链管理以及库存管理来说至关重要，本次研发的物料临近效期管理app可以批量的追踪管理在库的临期物料，同时根据中国本地化的业务需求，不同企业用户可在本报表中自定义效期管理阈值来进行查询，比如基于业务管理多样化的需求来设置特定企业是1年的效期警示范围抑或是半年的效期警示范围。最后，可基于报表的显示结果为后续业务操作处理提供决策依据，最大限度减少损失并优化库存周转。

2. 应用场景

2.1 库存优化

临近效期的物料识别：本报表可以快速识别出即将过期或临近效期的物料，帮助企业及时采取措施。如库存调整建议：基于物料的效期情况，提供库存调整建议，例如减少订单数量、加速销售或促销等。

2.2 销售策略制定

促销活动规划：根据临近效期的物料情况，制定有针对性的促销活动，促进库存流转，减少损失。定价优化：结合物料效期信息，调整定价策略，以促进销售并降低库存积压风险。

2.3 客户满意度提升

及时补货：通过报表提供的信息，及时补充临近效期物料，确保客户可以获得新鲜的产品。增强品牌形象：有效的效期管理可以减少客户投诉和退货，提升品牌形象和客户满意度。

2.4 客制化效期警示范围阈值

根据企业实际业务管理需求，设定效期警示范围阈值（如：1年以上为绿灯警示，6个月到1年为黄灯警示，6个月以内为红灯警示），报表基于此设定显示相对应的查询结果。

3. 价值

3.1 减少损失

通过及时识别临近效期的物料并采取相应措施，企业可以减少因过期或临近效期而导致的废弃和损失。

3.2 优化库存周转

提供库存调整建议和促销活动规划，帮助企业优化库存周转率，降低库存积压风险，释放资金。

3.3 提高销售效率

通过定价优化和促销活动制定，提高了销售效率和销售额，增强了企业的竞争力。

3.4 提升客户满意度

通过及时补货和确保产品新鲜度，提升了客户满意度，增强客户忠诚度，进而提升了品牌价值。 此次研发的物料临期管理app为公有云中物料效期管理功能锦上添花，创新点客户可结合自己库存管理的需求设定自定义的效期管理阈值，来实现客制化的效期管理，从而提升企业的库存管理水平，为后续业务活动提供决策依据，提升竞争力和盈利能力。

4. 功能展示

4.1 警示灯自定义阈值配置app

每个企业由于不同业务管理需要，可能对临近效期的提醒范围定义不同，使用警示灯自定义阈值配置app可以自定义设置效期多少范围需显示为红灯，多少范围需显示为黄灯，多少范围需显示为绿灯，自定义设置满足不同企业客制化效期管理需求。

4.2 物料临期报表app效果展示

本次研发的物料临期报表大体取值取自CDS view： I_MaterialStock_2 / I_BATCH/ batch characteristics，叠加逻辑比如：显示结果中如果批次主数据没有效期，则该条目数据不显示；若批次库存为0，则不显示在报表中；从I_MaterialStock_2根据物料工厂批次取数显示条目的时候，筛选stock type=01，汇总库存数量stock quantity显示成一条即可（若需要考虑其他状态的批次库存如冻结等可按需调整取值逻辑）。您也可根据您的实际业务需求增加或者减少报表显示字段，同时若需要有报表邮件提醒功能，也可作进一步探索。

结语

我们的物料临期管理App为企业提供了一种智能化、定制化的物料效期管理解决方案，帮助企业提高供应链管理效率，降低成本，增强竞争力，实现可持续发展。欢迎有相关业务需求的客户在自己的系统中测试并使用。

entry.title: PaPM on-premise - Is there a Table which cointains the FID dependences?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I'm struggling with searching a table that shows "where used" dependences between functions. When you enter in a specific Environmend ID and version from modeling view, when you click on a function and then on "where used" button, it opens a pop up that show the list of the functions that used that function. Anyone knows in SE11 if there is a specific table that show this?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Text Editor Using CL_GUI_TEXTEDIT Displaying Text from Internal Table
entry.content:
ABAP = "Allgemeiner Bereichtsaufbereitungsprozessor". Advanced ... is your invention?

By the way: These are well known topics in GUI programming. You should not code directly in modules, since all variables are global there. Furthermore it is in general enough to have 2 modules. PAI and PBO.

entry.title: Re: Customer is sending DELFOR and ORDERS/ORDCHG
entry.content: Hey Peter, how you managed to go for the second process, the one that provides update with exact quantity and date? did you use ORDCHG finally?

entry.title: router Non-xml condition error as Invalid format of condition expression
entry.content:
Hello Experts, Cloud Integration , SAP Integration Suite,

I have stored properties in content modifier and trying to apply NON-XML condition in router to check the length.

But its giving an error as Invalid format of condition expression.

Property as below:

  1. C4C_ContactID --> value from Xpath
  2. userId --> value from Xpath
( ${property.C4C_ContactID} = null or ${property.C4C_ContactID.trim().length()} = '0' ) and ( ${property.userId} = null or ${property.userId.trim().length()} = '0' )

Kindly help me to understand what is wrong in above condition.

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: Cannot retrieve session with VBA
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to retrieve my SAP session with the following VBA code

If Not IsObject(app) Then
Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject("SAPGUI")
Set app = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(Connection) Then
Set Connection = app.Children(0)
End If
If Not IsObject(session) Then
Set session = Connection.Children(0)
End If
If IsObject(WScript) Then
WScript.ConnectObject session, "on"
WScript.ConnectObject Application, "on"
End If

I get an error on the following line

Set session = Connection.Children(0)

Error message: The enumerator of the collection cannot find an element with the specified index.

User scripting is enabled on my machine. And I open SAP and login with my account before executing code above.

Can you please share your ideas on a resolution?

entry.title: Re: Using memoization to optimize pure functions in ABAP
entry.content:
1. The use of linear algebra (Eigenvector Basis) can improve the calculation of the Fibonacci numbers drastically.

2. Buffering costs memory.

entry.title: Converting C Code to Abap
entry.content:
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
 
// N is the size of the 2D matrix   N*N
#define N 9
 
/* A utility function to print grid */
void print(int arr[N][N])
{
     for (int i = 0; i < N; i++)
      {
         for (int j = 0; j < N; j++)
            printf("%d ",arr[i][j]);
         printf("\n");
       }
}
 
// Checks whether it will be legal 
// to assign num to the
// given row, col
int isSafe(int grid[N][N], int row,
                       int col, int num)
{
     
    // Check if we find the same num
    // in the similar row , we return 0
    for (int x = 0; x <= 8; x++)
        if (grid[row][x] == num)
            return 0;
 
    // Check if we find the same num in the
    // similar column , we return 0
    for (int x = 0; x <= 8; x++)
        if (grid[x][col] == num)
            return 0;
 
    // Check if we find the same num in the
    // particular 3*3 matrix, we return 0
    int startRow = row - row % 3,
                 startCol = col - col % 3;
   
    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++)
        for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++)
            if (grid[i + startRow][j +
                          startCol] == num)
                return 0;
 
    return 1;
}
 
/* Takes a partially filled-in grid and attempts
to assign values to all unassigned locations in
such a way to meet the requirements for
Sudoku solution (non-duplication across rows,
columns, and boxes) */
int solveSudoku(int grid[N][N], int row, int col)
{
     
    // Check if we have reached the 8th row
    // and 9th column (0
    // indexed matrix) , we are
    // returning true to avoid
    // further backtracking
    if (row == N - 1 && col == N)
        return 1;
 
    //  Check if column value  becomes 9 ,
    //  we move to next row and
    //  column start from 0
    if (col == N)
    {
        row++;
        col = 0;
    }
   
    // Check if the current position
    // of the grid already contains
    // value >0, we iterate for next column
    if (grid[row][col] > 0)
        return solveSudoku(grid, row, col + 1);
 
    for (int num = 1; num <= N; num++)
    {
         
        // Check if it is safe to place
        // the num (1-9)  in the
        // given row ,col  ->we move to next column
        if (isSafe(grid, row, col, num)==1)
        {
            /* assigning the num in the
               current (row,col)
               position of the grid
               and assuming our assigned num
               in the position
               is correct     */
            grid[row][col] = num;
           
            //  Checking for next possibility with next
            //  column
            if (solveSudoku(grid, row, col + 1)==1)
                return 1;
        }
       
        // Removing the assigned num ,
        // since our assumption
        // was wrong , and we go for next
        // assumption with
        // diff num value
        grid[row][col] = 0;
    }
    return 0;
}
 
int main()
{
    // 0 means unassigned cells
    int grid[N][N] = { { 3, 0, 6, 5, 0, 8, 4, 0, 0 },
                       { 5, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 },
                       { 0, 8, 7, 0, 0, 0, 0, 3, 1 },
                       { 0, 0, 3, 0, 1, 0, 0, 8, 0 },
                       { 9, 0, 0, 8, 6, 3, 0, 0, 5 },
                       { 0, 5, 0, 0, 9, 0, 6, 0, 0 },
                       { 1, 3, 0, 0, 0, 0, 2, 5, 0 },
                       { 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 7, 4 },
                       { 0, 0, 5, 2, 0, 6, 3, 0, 0 } };
 
    if (solveSudoku(grid, 0, 0)==1)
        print(grid);
    else
        printf("No solution exists");
 
    return 0;
    // This is code is contributed by Pradeep Mondal P
}
 
Dear guys, can you translate this code to abap?
 
ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: Open quantity available in PO to create IBD = 0
entry.content:
Good day all!

I am new in this SAP community. Wanted to see if there is anyone in here that might be able to help or put me in the right direction.

When I want to do the GR in SAP fiori. I see that this: 'Qty Avil... (Open qty in available in PO to create IBD)' = 0.

Because of this, I can not update the 'IBD Qty' to the value '2'.  

Does any one have had this before?

Thanks!

Nadine

ps. not sure if I have selected the correct group to post this.

entry.title: Re: About the Email Address used inside WorkFlow
entry.content: Business Workflow is a nightmare and should not be used at all.

entry.title: Different GR processing time for double sourcing
entry.content:
Hi

I started to use double sourcing for one material using MEQM

For the main vendor delivering 80% of our needs we use truck for delivery. GR /transportation is 7 days

Second vendor delivering 20% is by sea. GR /transportation is 50 days

Both vendors got 14 days lead time.

 

How can I get SAP to generate requisitions based on the different transportation time for the two vendors?

You cannot set a transportation time /GR in Info record for each vendor. Only place is in Master Data and that goes to both vendors

entry.title: Re: Email Notification after Screening Maintenance Request
entry.content:
Hi Tim,

Thanks a lot for your help. I'll have a look at it and come back on this topic if I have a solution with the situation handlings so I can share it with others.

Br,

Dany R.

entry.title: Re: Malware scanner in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: We would also be interested in a malware scanner for the runtime. Is there anything planned to be included within cloud integration or do we need to rely on external solutions / BTP malware scanning service?

entry.title: First SAP Stammtisch New York City - April 2024
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’m thrilled to announce the inaugural SAP Stammtisch in New York City! We want to establishing a vibrant SAP Community Hub right here in the heart of the Big Apple!

The first of its kind in New York City, our meetups will provide a platform to discuss SAP News and technology (and not) with enthusiasts from all backgrounds.

We're kicking off in New York City, a bustling metropolis known for its diversity, innovation, and tech-savvy population. Nestled between the boroughs of Manhattan and Brooklyn, New York City boasts a plethora of developers, SAP-centric companies, industries, and eager individuals.

The concept behind SAP Stammtisch is simple: an informal gathering to delve into SAP-related topics, discover new insights, and expand our professional circles.

This meetup welcomes everyone – whether you're a seasoned SAP user, a developer, a consultant, an architect, a business analyst, or a project manager. Join us and feel free to bring along a friend. Additionally, if you have any connection to SAP, we'd love to hear your perspective.

For those unfamiliar with the term Stammtisch, it originates from German, meaning "regulars' table." It signifies an informal group meeting held regularly, often around a large, round table. It's a relaxed affair aimed at fostering connections and conversations.

For more details, visit the SAP Community event page.

Where and When
This Stammtisch promises a unique setting, hosted at a trendy bar hangout in New York City, complete with vintage video games like Pac-Man and Donkey Kong! Alongside the retro gaming fun, you can enjoy a variety of craft beers.

 

📅Date: April 26, 2024
🕖Time: 7:00 PM to 10:00 PM
📍Venue: 148 W 24th St, New York, NY 10011
[Google Map link]

 

Agenda

As is customary for Stammtisch events, there is no set agenda. However, considering our park venue, we might kick things off with discussions on the cloud, embracing the natural surroundings.

Who's Invited

Everyone with an interest in SAP Community topics is welcome to attend.
Feel free to join us on Meetup and register so we know how many people to expect. 
[Meetup Registration Link] 

Note
Feel free to reach out to me for any queries or clarifications.

Looking forward to seeing you all there!

I love you all,
Sebastiano

entry.title: Re: Learning integration with SAP Opportunity Marketplace
entry.content:
Good day @saisravanib 

Please read here and subsequent pages: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_LEARNING/5fae31b1299d4033b665edabea7b9087/4fe77fd06d944f5bb33db09159d0cb79.html

And here as well: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_OPPORTUNITY_MARKETPLACE/ac490d3d250b4ca9ae8375e6e2139830/e518c3678ba646f89a0df922e7cfac88.html

From our documentation, sealing is not a prerequisite for Learning Recommendations in OMP. It however is for leveraging Learning within Talent Intelligence Hub.

Hope it helps

KR, Frederic

entry.title: Asset Manager 2210 Extend SAMXXXX_WORKORDER_GENERIC by new entity - zombie entries in List
entry.content:
Hi experts,

at the moment my team is working at some extension for Workorder operation for the MDO Handler Class /MERP/CL_PM_WORKORDER_DO in Asset Manager Version 2210. Our goal was to extend the Entity MyWorkOrderOperation by a field which returns a list of informations to some component parts, which are workorder operation dependent. We then found out that in comparison to the WorkManager, the Asset Manager with its ODATA based structuring does not support lists or structures given as an entity field.  So we must create a new entity which includes our component information and which we need then to link to MyWorkOrderOperation.  At first, we wanted to create a new MDO ID + handler class + entity, which we would then link to MyWorkOrderOperation with the help of setting the new entity as dependend assoziation to it. We then found out that this would perfectly work for the initial sync, but we also wanted the list to be transfered as delta depending on the operation. This means whenever a workorder operation is assigned to a mobil client user and is transferred to the mobil client, we want to transfer the components part information with it. To do this we also have to implement a delta conzept. We thought of using the workorder exchange object for this. After analysing this, we saw that the exchange object itself returns all the changes which were done to any pm workorder, which is to much. We expected that we only get the change information for our mobile client user. We analyzed then the entity MyWorkOrderOpation and its MDO_ID SAMXXXX_WORKORDER_GENERIC and with this its handler /MERP/CL_PM_WORKORDER . Wefound out, that the filtering for the only relevant information is then done by the handler and is quite complex because of a lot of low code setting in the configpanel and with this using different implementation strategies. So copying all suited the methods to a new handler was not an option for us. Instead, we came to the conclusion that we put our new entity in the SAMXXXX_WORKORDER_GENERIC handler. Adding a new entity with the help of the existing BADI structures was not possible, so we created a new ZCL_PM_WORKORDER class which inheritance of /MERP/CL_PM_WORKORDER.
We redefined /mfnd/if_core_omdo_bo_model~define_bo_entity_model. To included the new entity structure and of course the old code with super before.

 We redefined load_entity_details with a super call at the beginning and added our new entity data gathering method in it.

For the data gathering we analyzed the Method GET_OBJKEYS_BY_DISTRIB_RULES and saw that the method fills the tab_bo_entity_keys_distr_rule for all entities defined in the handler. For the delta, we want to collect our data based on the workorder operations delta. So for this we do not need our own delta keylist we just need the ones of MyWorkOrderOperations. So we take the informations of the deltalist of MyWorkOrderOperation and collect our data with the help of its key informations and then return the information to the mobile client.

This worked at first sign perfectly. When a user gets a new workorder operation assigned our entity was perfectly transferring only the information for the new assigned workorderoperation. For the deletion we configured an association with Principle on Delete Cascade in the configpanel. We added this in MyWorkOrderHeader with referential constraint by ORDERID and MyWorkOrderOpetion with referential constraint by ORDERID and Operationnumber

The Deletion seems to be working fine, when an operation was unassigned also our custom component information which depend on the operation are not shown. A frontend developer found then out by accident, when he debugged the new entity, that the entries of some custom component information are still exist, even if the operation on which they depend is not available anymore. They are then just invisible for the user, but exist in the cash. So, you can say we have some zombie entries in the list now… My question is now, did we miss some configuration there? Do you know how to avoid this zombie entries? Is there a step we need to do in the backend so they will be deleted?

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Extensibility - Types of Extensibilities
entry.content:
Hi @PedroLopes,

Thank you for the share. Will definitely include it in the blog!

Best regards,

Filipe Bastias

entry.title: Boost SCM Efficiency: Material Expiry Mgmt App Empowers Intelligent Decision-Making for Enterprises
entry.content:
In the process of supporting public cloud customers, we frequently hear inquiries from clients who have enabled batch management, asking whether there are reminders for nearing expiry materials and batch query reports for such materials. In standard products, retrieving relevant information often requires searching through multiple reports, such as inventory reports and batch details. To meet this demand, we have developed a Material Expiry Management App on S/4HANA public cloud through developer extensibility (also known as cloud ABAP development), aiming to help enterprises intelligently manage material expiry and enhance supply chain management efficiency.

1. Business Background

In industries like pharmaceuticals, medical devices, cosmetics, food production, or retail, managing material expiry is a crucial aspect of the supply chain. In SAP public cloud solutions, companies usually enable batch management for materials that require expiry management. They utilize batch basic view fields supplemented with batch classification characteristics to manage production dates, expiration dates, remaining days until expiry, manufacturers, and batch numbers related to product expiry management. From a business perspective, expired or near-expiry materials can lead to waste, profit loss, or even affect customer satisfaction. Therefore, proper expiry management is vital for enterprise supply chain and inventory management. The Material Expiry Management app developed this time can track and manage near-expiry materials in stock in bulk. Additionally, based on localized business requirements in China, different enterprise users can customize expiry management threshold values in this report for queries. For example, specific companies can set a one-year expiry warning range or a six-month expiry warning range based on diversified business management needs. Finally, the display results of the report provide decision-making basis for subsequent business operations, minimizing losses and optimizing inventory turnover.

2. Application Scenarios

2.1 Inventory Optimization

Identification of near-expiry materials: This report can quickly identify materials that are about to expire or are near expiry, helping companies take timely measures. For example, inventory adjustment suggestions: Based on the material expiry situation, provide inventory adjustment suggestions, such as reducing order quantities, accelerating sales, or promotions.

2.2 Sales Strategy Development

Promotion planning: Based on the near-expiry material situation, formulate targeted promotional activities to promote inventory turnover and reduce losses. Pricing optimization: Adjust pricing strategies based on material expiry information to promote sales and reduce the risk of inventory backlog.

2.3 Customer Satisfaction Enhancement

Timely replenishment: Through the information provided by the report, replenish near-expiry materials in a timely manner to ensure that customers can obtain fresh products. Enhanced brand image: Effective expiry management can reduce customer complaints and returns, enhance brand image and customer satisfaction.

2.4 Customized Expiry Warning Thresholds

According to the actual business management needs of the enterprise, set expiry warning threshold values (e.g., green light warning for over one year, yellow light warning for six months to one year, and red light warning for less than six months), and the report displays corresponding query results based on this setting.

3. Value

3.1 Reduction of Losses

By timely identifying near-expiry materials and taking corresponding measures, companies can reduce waste and losses caused by expiration or near expiry.

3.2 Optimization of Inventory Turnover

Providing inventory adjustment suggestions and promotion planning helps companies optimize inventory turnover, reduce the risk of inventory backlog, and release funds.

3.3 Improvement of Sales Efficiency

Through pricing optimization and promotion activity formulation, sales efficiency and sales revenue are increased, enhancing the company's competitiveness.

3.4 Enhancement of Customer Satisfaction

By timely replenishment and ensuring product freshness, we have enhanced customer satisfaction, boosted customer loyalty, and consequently elevated brand value. This development of the Material Expiry Management app adds an extra layer of sophistication to the material expiry management function in the public cloud. The innovative aspect lies in allowing customers to customize expiry management thresholds according to their inventory management needs, thus achieving personalized expiry management. This enhancement elevates the company's inventory management standards, provides decision-making basis for subsequent business activities, and enhances competitiveness and profitability.

4. Function Demonstration

4.1 Customizable Warning Threshold Configuration App

Due to varying business management needs, each company may define different ranges for nearing expiry reminders. The Customizable Warning Threshold Configuration App allows users to set customized ranges for when to display red, yellow, or green warning lights, meeting the diverse customization needs of different enterprises for expiry management.

4.2 Material Expiry Report App Effect Display

The material expiry report developed this time generally extracts data from the CDS view: I_MaterialStock_2 / I_BATCH / batch characteristics, with additional logic such as: if batch master data has no expiry date, the entry will not be displayed; if batch inventory is 0, it will not be displayed in the report; when extracting entries based on material plant batches from I_MaterialStock_2, filter for stock type=01, and summarize the stock quantity as one entry (if other statuses of batch inventory need to be considered, adjust the extraction logic accordingly). You can also add or remove report display fields based on your actual business needs. Additionally, if there is a need for report email reminders, further exploration can be conducted.

Conclusion

Our Material Expiry Management App provides enterprises with an intelligent and customized solution for managing material expiry, helping them improve supply chain management efficiency, reduce costs, enhance competitiveness, and achieve sustainable development. Customers with relevant business needs are welcome to test and use it in your systems.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Replication Flow from S/4HANA to Azure Data Lake
entry.content:
@CameronK @TuncayKaraca , Thanks for sharing the knowledge. 

Does the same process works for S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition and Azure Data Lake? Thanks for clarifying. 

Best Regards,
Sri

entry.title: Re: Add Learning Survey to Two Different Courses
entry.content:
Dear @margaretstraub,

Satisfaction survey is associated to the item completion. Marking attendance in a class of an item does not automatically trigger the survey. It may be manually triggered by the admin, even before the item completion is recorded. In this case, the survey is sent out to all registrants, regardless of being later credited with the completion or not.

Once completion is recorded, if the APM Course Feedback and Follow-Up Surveys Email Notification is scheduled, the email notification will be sent out (read here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_LEARNING/5fae31b1299d4033b665edabea7b9087/4d4331b959974767b7956691419f90a0.html).

> Can a user only complete a survey once even if it is attached to two different courses? No. Two different items with the same survey template will be sent out twice upon completion of the two items.

> Is there a setting that will allow the same user to complete the same survey for two different classes? No. Survey works from the item completion, not the class attendance. If the item is completed multiple times, the survey may be triggered mutliple times as well. Some scenarios may vary here.

> Is this email automatically triggered? No, please ref above to the automatic process that needs to be scheduled.

Hope that helps

KR, Frederic

entry.title: Re: How to convert JSON string array to internal table?
entry.content:
Mio san,

I faced a similar problem in the ABAP environment of BTP.

The question and its answer proved to be helpful.

"string_table" type can also be used, so add it.

 

  METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.

    DATA:
      begin of ls_result,
        data type string,
*        tab  type standard table of string with empty key,
        tab  TYPE string_table,
      end of ls_result.

    DATA(lv_json_string) = |\{\r\n| &
                           |    "data": "abc",\r\n| &
                           |    "tab": ["a", "b", "c"]\r\n| &
                           |\}|.

    xco_cp_json=>data->from_string( lv_json_string )->apply( VALUE #(
      ( xco_cp_json=>transformation->camel_case_to_underscore )
      ( xco_cp_json=>transformation->boolean_to_abap_bool )
    ) )->write_to( REF #( ls_result ) ).

    out->write( ls_result-data ).
    LOOP AT ls_result-tab REFERENCE INTO DATA(lr).
      out->write( lr->* ).
    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

 

Result.

entry.title: Re: How to solve the error "CSRF token validation failed”...
entry.content:
Changing the Default CSRF Protection Mechanism

To change the default CSRF protection mechanism, proceed as follows:

  1. Go to transaction SICF.

  2. Navigate to the ICF node for your service.

  3. Double-click your service node.

  4. On Service Data choose GUI Configuration.Caution

  5. Enter the following values:

    • Parameter Name: ~CHECK_CSRF_TOKEN

    • Parameter Value: 0/1 (disable/enable)

      Compatiblity Mode for SP02 - HTTP Handler in SICF (node sdata)

      ( Default : X-Requested-With, to enable XSRF check use, ~CHECK_CSRF_TOKEN=1)

      The request handler is /IWFND/CL_SDATA_ODATA_APP.

      Standard Mode - HTTP Handler in SICF (node odata)

      ( Default: XSRF check, to disable and switch to X-Requested-With, use ~CHECK_CSRF_TOKEN=0)

      The request handler is /IWFND/CL_SODATA_HTTP_HANDLER.

  6. Choose Continue and save your settings.

entry.title: Bank balance upload for G/L Account is not supported.
entry.content:
Bank Balance migration error message: "Balance upload for GL account "XXXXXXXXX" Company code "YYYY" is not supported".


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Bank balance upload for G/L Account is not supported.
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

You noticed a different behaviour for CE2402 as compareded to CE2308 because this migration process for bank account balance is an obsolete process.

As the error message long text describes: -

Use Fiori App 'Manage Memo Records 2.0' to create bank account balance flow with Memo Record Category ‘ACTMO (Actual Cash Memo)’.

We have new Fiori App 'Manage Memo Records 2.0' to create actual bank account balance which is technical same as old bank balance flow, and new actual flow can be created freely as balance adjustment.

It can help you create new flows in a short time.

 

Refer, the help portal document Migration object FI - Bank account balance help portal link.

 

Same information is given in the SAP KBA ##3452616 Bank balance upload for G/L Account is not supported.

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
Always good to brush up on your OData access … I mean, we’re at SAP.

We started the challenge earlier this week with a preliminary task so you can have your SAP Build Apps set up. Now we'll start one challenge a week, on Wednesdays – today's about working with S/4HANA Cloud OData services.

The challenges so far:

  • Task 0: Set Up SAP Build Apps
  • Task 1: OData (this post)

Getting data from SAP backends is one of the key capabilities of SAP Build Apps, and one of the things you’ll want to make sure is second nature for you. To get SAP backend data into your app, you’ll need to know a few things.

  • SAP Accelerator Hub: A set of demo SAP services – e.g., S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, Ariba – you can use for building your apps. 
  • Destinations: To access APIs, SAP BTP lets you define connections to backend data in the form of destinations – basically, a set of parameters including URL / authentication info.
  • Data Resources: This is an SAP Build Apps object that defines which data – e.g., which service, entity, filtering – we want for our app.
  • Data Variables: This is an SAP Build Apps object that actually makes the backend call and sets aside space for the retrieved data.

Within the data variable there is a way to filter, sort, and paginate the data that you retrieve from the backend. For more on these tasks, you can see this blog. 

In this challenge, you will get demo sales order data, filter/sort/paginate the data, and display the data in your app.

👉Your Task

To do this task, you'll need an SAP Build Apps system and to import our skeleton app. To do all this, make sure you've done Task 0.

  • Create a destination to the Sales Order v4 OData service on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub. You will have to create an account on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, and have access to an API key (free). To do all this, there is a 2-minute video:

IMPORTANT: When you create your destination, the URL should be:

https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4han acloud/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV

YOU'LL LIKE THIS: We have given you a file you can import to create the destination in a few seconds. You just have to add your API key.

  • In your app project from the last challenge, make a data resource to this destination, and enable the A_SalesOrderItem entity.
  • Open the S/4HANA Sales Orders page in the app we gave you, and create a data variable based on the data resource you created.

    IMPORTANT: In the data variable, you MUST implement sorting/filtering/paging  as follows:

    • Only return records where IncoTermsLocation1 = Palo Alto.
    • Sort by the net amount, showing the largest amounts first.
    • Show only the first 10 records.
  • Now make the UI by dragging a List Item control onto the canvas, and show the following 2 fields:
    • SalesOrderItemText
    • Net Amount

To make it look nice, I changed the width and height for the list item component, using the Custom setting and setting the width to 90%. I also changed the shape. You can adjust the UI as you like.

  • Run the app in the SAP Build Apps preview app or web preview, and navigate to the S/4HANA Sales Orders (use the custom menu at the bottom of the home page).

Take a screenshot, something like this (your values will differ and MUST reflect the filtering above).

 

Take note of the amount for the 3rd entry – this is the value you must hash (remember, your values will be different than the one's above). The value should be with 2 decimal places, no commas and no currency sign, something like this: 123.99. 

  • Go to the Submit page by clicking the hash icon next to your community ID.
    • Make sure your Community ID is entered properly.
    • Enter the amount for the string to hash. 
    • Click Hash, and now enter the hash and your screenshot as a reply to this thread.

Your entry should look like this:

Bonus Tasks:

  • Bonus #1: Tap somewhere inside the app – on the S/4HANA Sales Order page – to view a 30-second video about an event the SAP Developer Advocates put on around the world (A second tap will hide the video). Type the event name in your reply. 

Explore the project to see how we were able to show the video.

  • Bonus #2: Since we’re here, take a second to subscribe to the SAP Developer YouTube channel, where you’ll find more videos on SAP Build.

entry.title: Dynamic QR-Code thru URL in a OLE-Object for printing Label with QR-Code
entry.content:
Hi y'all;
we used in our Label a QR Code we got dynamiclly over API Google Charts. Now Google discontinued this service so i got a simalaer service called quickcharts.io but Crystal Report doesnt show me the QR Code.
When i try the Link in the browser it works...
 
The old working string:
"http://chart.apis.google.com/chart?cht=qr&chs=250x250&chl="& {Etikett_25020.ZEILE9}

The new NOT working string:
"https://quickchart.io/chart?cht=qr&chs=250x250&chl="& {Etikett_25020.ZEILE9}
 
Works in any browser like this:
https://quickchart.io/chart?cht=qr&chs=250x250&chl=123456789

Please HELP!

entry.title: Re: How do you retrieve an PM equipment using a linked FI...
